array.string: cd "$HOME/AI/openclaw-factory" || exit 1; export HOME="/Users/doyopc"; export PATH="/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin"; export GIT_TERMINAL_PROMPT=0; mkdir -p logs; source .venv/bin/activate || exit 1; export PYTHONPATH="$HOME/AI/openclaw-factory"; export DB_PATH="$HOME/AI/openclaw-factory-daemon/data/openclaw_real.db"; export DEV_REPO_PATH="$HOME/AI/openclaw-factory"; exec python -u bots/dev_executor_v1.py >> logs/dev_executor_daemon_v1.out 2>> logs/dev_executor_daemon_v1.err
